title: Coldplay: Music of the Spheres - Live at River Plate
original_title: Coldplay: Music of the Spheres - Live at River Plate
overview: Filmed during Coldplay’s sold out, ten night run at Buenos Aires’ River Plate stadium, this spectacular concert film features remixed sound and stunning visuals, including a host of previously-unseen footage.
